title: Vigilance Clock Test
description: A high-fidelity psychological simulation platform based on the historical Mackworth Clock experiment designed to test sustained long-term alertness and cognitive tracking thresholds. Built completely client-side inside standalone browser layers, the utility orchestrates a circular target array grid where a solitary visual marker ticks smoothly along circular layout loops at standard 1-step increments. The engine applies an asynchronous randomized statistical interval probability generator to trigger rare double-jump skips, logging precise user response times and omission profiles via local browser arrays.
